mapper.sql: cd.BDGT_PRFR_YMD , co.HDQR_BOB_DCD , COUNT(*) AS total , SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON, cd.BDMN_ITEX_MNGM_NO) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt1 , SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON, CONCAT(cd.BRCD, '-', cd.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON)) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt2 , SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON, TRIM(cd.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON)) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt3 , SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON, cd.BDMN_ITEX_MNGM_NO) > 0 AND INSTR(co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON, CONCAT(cd.BRCD, '-', cd.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON)) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt4 , SUM(CASE WHEN cd.ARIF_MDL_USE_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS arinUseCnt
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM CARD_OUTPUT co INNER JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY TSTM_YMD, TSTM_NO, BRCD ORDER BY BDGT_PRFR_YMD DESC, BDGT_PRFR_NO DESC ) AS rn FROM CARD_LEARNING_DATA t ) sub WHERE sub.rn = 1 ) cd ON co.TSTM_YMD = cd.TSTM_YMD AND co.TSTM_NO = cd.TSTM_NO AND co.BRCD = cd.BRCD GROUP BY cd.BDGT_PRFR_YMD, co.HDQR_BOB_DCD ORDER BY cd.BDGT_PRFR_YMD DESC, co.HDQR_BOB_DCD ASC

SELECT
FROM BILL_OUTPUT co INNER JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY BASE_YM, TXBL_SRN, BRCD ORDER BY BDGT_PRFR_YMD DESC, BDGT_PRFR_NO DESC ) AS rn FROM BILL_LEARNING_DATA t ) sub WHERE sub.rn = 1 ) cd ON co.BASE_YM = cd.BASE_YM AND co.TXBL_SRN = cd.TXBL_SRN AND co.BRCD = cd.BRCD GROUP BY cd.BDGT_PRFR_YMD, co.HDQR_BOB_DCD ORDER BY cd.BDGT_PRFR_YMD DESC, co.HDQR_BOB_DCD ASC

SELECT
FROM CARD_OUTPUT co INNER JOIN ( -- CARD_LEARNING_DATA: 최근 2개월 + (TSTM_YMD, TSTM_NO, BRCD)별 최신 1건 SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY TSTM_YMD, TSTM_NO, BRCD ORDER BY BDGT_PRFR_YMD DESC, BDGT_PRFR_NO DESC ) AS rn FROM CARD_LEARNING_DATA t WHERE t.TSTM_YMD >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 MONTH), '%Y%m%d') ) sub WHERE sub.rn = 1 ) cd ON co.TSTM_YMD = cd.TSTM_YMD AND co.TSTM_NO = cd.TSTM_NO AND co.BRCD = cd.BRCD WHERE co.TSTM_YMD >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 MONTH), '%Y%m%d') GROUP BY cd.BDGT_PRFR_YMD, co.HDQR_BOB_DCD ORDER BY cd.BDGT_PRFR_YMD DESC, co.HDQR_BOB_DCD ASC

SELECT
FROM BILL_OUTPUT co INNER JOIN ( -- BILL_LEARNING_DATA: 최근 2개월 + (BASE_YM, TXBL_SRN, BRCD)별 최신 1건 SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY BASE_YM, TXBL_SRN, BRCD ORDER BY BDGT_PRFR_YMD DESC, BDGT_PRFR_NO DESC ) AS rn FROM BILL_LEARNING_DATA t WHERE t.BASE_YM >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 MONTH), '%Y%m') ) sub WHERE sub.rn = 1 ) cd ON co.BASE_YM = cd.BASE_YM AND co.TXBL_SRN = cd.TXBL_SRN AND co.BRCD = cd.BRCD WHERE co.BASE_YM >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 MONTH), '%Y%m') GROUP BY cd.BDGT_PRFR_YMD, co.HDQR_BOB_DCD ORDER BY cd.BDGT_PRFR_YMD DESC, co.HDQR_BOB_DCD ASC
